---
title: "Inverse Problems: Theory, Regularization, and Bayesian Approaches"
subtitle: "CROSS-003 | Cross-Cutting Methods"
description: "The mathematical theory of determining causes from observed effects. Every model calibration problem is an inverse problem. This course covers the theory of ill-posedness, regularization, and modern Bayesian and computational approaches."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Inverse Problems: Theory, Regularization, and Bayesian Approaches

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
